ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, moderator, admin) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief user bio */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the account */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title or name of the content */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was published */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the content */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the content */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., draft, published, archived, deleted) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the content has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the content has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the content has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the content */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media content */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Moderation status (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the content */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content that was changed */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the content */,
  "content_text" TEXT /* Text content of the version */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., edit, delete, publish) */,
  "moderation_status" TEXT /* Moderation status of the version (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the version */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media in the version */,
  "media_url" TEXT /* URL of the media content in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the content */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Optional feedback provided by the user */,
  "rated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was given */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating was given anonymously */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating has been flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role, stored in JSON format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
